---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV — Bingjin Xue"
---

Full CV: [**PDF**](assets/CV.pdf) *(updated April 2026)*

## Positions

- **Assistant Professor of Economics**, Paul College of Business and Economics, University of New Hampshire, 2023–present

## Education

- **Ph.D. in Economics**, [Institution], [Year]
- **M.A. in Economics**, [Institution], [Year]
- **B.A. in Economics**, [Institution], [Year]

## Fields

Health economics · Applied microeconometrics · Causal inference · Labor economics

## Grants and awards

- [Grant name], [funder], [amount], [years]
- [Award name], [institution], [year]

## Service

- Referee: *Journal of Health Economics*, *Journal of Development Economics*, [others]
- [Committee or editorial role]

## Contact

[bingjin.xue@unh.edu](mailto:bingjin.xue@unh.edu) · Paul College of Business and Economics, University of New Hampshire, Durham, NH
